title: The Kozuki Bond
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on the kozuki bond within the Raizo Is Safe storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If we continue on like this,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We will just cause Lord MOMONOSUKE to suffer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For the sake of our LORD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We shall keep things civilized, but that won't change how I really feel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The rulers of Day and Night have finally made up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Amazing... so this is the power of the Kouzuki clan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The two rulers have made up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you learn the proper way to ascend the vines,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You can go all the way to the top.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: So this is where Raizo is!?

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: I can't wait! A real Ninja!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: We're gonna see an actual Ninja!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Uuugh... I still feel terrible, Kinemon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You could wait for us at the bottom, my LORD.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: The closer we get to the whale, the more I can hear this loud voice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He really is like his Highness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There was another who said much the same.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I can hear some- one screaming down there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why didn't you hand me over to the enemy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The ones who have been bringing me food are all heavily wounded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I heard the country is now safe ...Is that true!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If you've been lying to me, I won't let you off lightly!

summary: The Kozuki Bond: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
